moon.nature: first thin crescent; new beginnings, planting
moon.offering: a night of beginnings — plant the intention; learn the item before you speak

hi-maui.name: Maui County
hi-maui.daily: Aloha, Maui County. Tonight is pō 1 Hilo — first thin crescent; new beginnings, planting. The moon's offering for those who govern and those who watch: a night of beginnings — plant the intention; learn the item before you speak. Sun and moon held together: lead in the light, decide in aloha.
